impact: Restores autonomous progress from no_eligible_tasks by giving the worker daemon narrow ordered validation and fixture tasks for lifecycle missing-information coverage before any live crawling or authenticated DevHub automation.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D daemon task tranche after completed lifecycle requirement validation work.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
